server/tests/test_heic_codec.py :: test_encode_decode_roundtrip
def test_encode_decode_roundtrip():
    raster = gradient_raster(24, 16)
    encoded = heic_bytes(raster, quality=85)
    assert encoded[4:8] == b"ftyp"
    info = inspect_heic_container(encoded)
    assert info.major_brand
    decoded = decode_heic(encoded)
    assert decoded.width == raster.width
    assert decoded.height == raster.height

server/tests/test_heic_codec.py :: test_decode_via_formats_router
def test_decode_via_formats_router():
    raster = solid_raster(12, 10, 40, 80, 120)
    payload = heic_bytes(raster)
    decoded = decode_image(payload, "photo.heic")
    assert decoded.width == 12
    assert decoded.height == 10

server/tests/test_heic_codec.py :: test_encode_rejects_empty_dimensions
def test_encode_rejects_empty_dimensions():
    from image_tool.raster import Raster

    with pytest.raises((HeicCodecError, ValueError)):
        encode_heic(Raster(0, 0, 3, bytearray()))

server/tests/test_heic_codec.py :: test_decode_rejects_non_heic_payload
def test_decode_rejects_non_heic_payload():
    with pytest.raises(HeicCodecError):
        decode_heic(b"not-heic")
